rows.label: qev056401_MSG0001
rows.name:
This is an incident we cannot
ignore. It is an important
problem for us Orpheans as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Let us lend Orphean strength to the
Earthlings. Please cooperate with us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask for details about what
this important problem is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_JNK0020
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what incident he is referring to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0003
rows.name:
It is regarding the safety of the
Biahno Water Purification Plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0004
rows.name:
There was an incident at the Biahno Water
Purification Plant where Earthlings were
attacked by the native creature Impreca.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0005
rows.name:
We Orpheans have an idea to ensure
such a tragedy does not happen again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0006
rows.name:
However, we will need the help of
Earthlings. As this is an endeavor that
benefits us as well, let us join forces.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0007
rows.name:
It is regarding the incident at the
Biahno Water Purification Plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0008
rows.name:
There was an incident at the Biahno Water
Purification Plant where Earthlings were
attacked by the native creature Impreca.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0009
rows.name:
We Orpheans have an idea to ensure
such a tragedy does not happen again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0010
rows.name:
However, we will need the help of
Earthlings. As this is an endeavor that
benefits us as well, let us join forces.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_JNK0050
rows.name: Interest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask how it benefits the Orpheans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_JNK0060
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask how he intends to help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0013
rows.name:
You are aware that we require Senirapa
Water in order to multiply, are you not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0014
rows.name:
But the functionality of the Biahno
Water Purification Plant is essential
for mass-producing Senirapa Water.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0015
rows.name:
We cannot allow it to be
threatened by native creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0016
rows.name:
Regarding a method to defend the Biahno Water Purification
Plant, Earthlings are far too few in number, and there
is a limit to the scope of BLADE's operations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0017
rows.name:
We propose the deployment
of Guard Machines.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0018
rows.name:
We propose the deployment of Guard
Machines as a method to defend the
Biahno Water Purification Plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0019
rows.name:
Earthlings are far too few in
number, and there is a limit to
the scope of BLADE's operations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0020
rows.name:
You are aware that we require Senirapa
Water in order to multiply, are you not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0021
rows.name:
But the functionality of the Biahno
Water Purification Plant is essential
for mass-producing Senirapa Water.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0022
rows.name:
We cannot allow it to be threatened
by native creatures. Please, make
use of the Guard Machines.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0023
rows.name:
Guard Machines are unmanned, fully
automated security machines.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0024
rows.name:
With these, you can secure the Biahno
Water Purification Plant by the
lakeside under an automated system.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0025
rows.name:
We are currently in the process
of manufacturing them, but we
are short on some parts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0026
rows.name:
Therefore, I would like you to obtain
Ouroboros Crystals and Genocide Eyes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0027
rows.name:
You should be able to acquire
these outside of NLA. Thank
you for your cooperation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0028
rows.name:
We are short on parts to
manufacture the Guard Machines.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0029
rows.name:
We should be able to complete
them once we have Ouroboros
Crystals and Genocide Eyes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0030
rows.name:
You should be able to acquire them
outside of NLA. I am counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0031
rows.name:
The work here is nearly finished.
All that's left is for the
requested parts to arrive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0032
rows.name:
How did it go? Were you able
to acquire the Ouroboros
Crystals and Genocide Eyes?

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0033
rows.name: Flawless work. I'm glad I asked you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0034
rows.name:
Once we install these, we can
immediately begin combat tests.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0035
rows.name:
...I apologize, but would you mind keeping me
company for that as well? We need the cooperation
of a strong individual like yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0036
rows.name:
The Guard Machine has already
been transported to the Arms
Performance Testing Ground.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0037
rows.name:
If you are willing to help, please ready
your equipment and meet me there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0038
rows.name:
Thank you for coming. I have just finished
all the adjustments here as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0039
rows.name:
...What do you think? Since it is a machine
meant to guard Earthlings, I tried giving
it a design that Earthlings would favor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0040
rows.name:
You find this sort of thing
adorable, do you not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod and agree that it's approachable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_SEL0041
rows.name: Honestly state that it looks weak.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0041
rows.name:
I am glad to hear that. It seems
that when we build things according
to our aesthetic sense...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0042
rows.name:
...Earthlings tend to find them
terrifying. My ingenuity paid off.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0043
rows.name:
...Well, even if its appearance is
approachable, inside, it's a high-performance
unit packed with Orphean wisdom.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0044
rows.name:
Hrm... Earthling sensibilities
truly are difficult to grasp...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0045
rows.name:
However, inside, it's a high-performance
unit packed with Orphean wisdom.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0046
rows.name:
If you let your guard down... it will
be disastrous. Please stay sharp as
you engage in the combat test.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0047
rows.name:
Well then, here we go! Please let
us gather plenty of combat data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0048
rows.name:
Thank you very much. We were
able to gather excellent data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0049
rows.name:
Based on this data, we will modify the
Guard Machines and deploy them to the
lakeside Biahno Water Purification Plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0050
rows.name:
I am certain they will successfully
defend the Biahno Water Purification
Plant from ferocious native creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0051
rows.name:
...Now, from here on out, we will use the
water purified by the Biahno Water Purification
Plant to generate Senirapa Water.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0052
rows.name:
By acquiring large amounts of
Senirapa Water, we will continue
to multiply steadily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0053
rows.name: It is a wonderful thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0054
rows.name:
We were planning to conduct the Guard
Machine's combat test at the Arms
Performance Testing Ground, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0055
rows.name:
It seems someone else was using it first,
and I was told to wait a little while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056401_MSG0056
rows.name: Let us wait until they are finished.[ST:wait ]
